goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The failure is harness-only. The test clicks a nonexistent Week of heading, so focus never leaves the quantity input and the real onBlur save/PATCH never occurs. Replace only that click with quantityInput.press('Tab'); preserve the PATCH wait and all 60/manual-override assertions.

worker_package.objective: Use semantic keyboard Tab to trigger the real blur/PATCH path, then complete browser/axe/screenshots, disposable DB, port, and diff evidence.

evidence: The input remains focused and the page has no Week of heading.
ShoppingListEditor saves only on quantity input blur and issues the awaited PATCH.
Database remained at quantity 50/manual override false, proving no PATCH occurred.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, port, browser output, and disposable DB.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 queued until passing receipt.
